title: Support plant care in a permaculture system
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Support plant care in a permaculture system demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Recognise plant care for a Zone 1 permaculture garden
